display.purpose: Hero headlines and page-defining statements only. Mixed case. Max 2 lines. Text-shadow only in video contexts.

headline.purpose: Section titles and sub-page headers. The chapter heading voice.

title.purpose: Named sections, card headers, curriculum day titles.

body.purpose: All running copy. Clinical specificity lives here. Max line length 65–75ch.

label.purpose: Category annotations, location tags, course metadata. Rendered in Clinical Brass at 55% opacity. The annotation layer.

shadows.name: video-text
shadows.purpose: Legibility tool for display text over video backgrounds only. Never used in body sections.

shadows.name: sticky-bar-ambient
shadows.purpose: Diffuse ambient lift on the course sticky bar when the page has scrolled. Structural only.

motion.name: ease-out-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions (hover, focus, accordion). Smooth, no bounce.

motion.name: ease-out-editorial
motion.purpose: Editorial entrance animations (fade-scale-in). Slightly slower deceleration for a more deliberate feel.

motion.name: hero-stagger-base
motion.purpose: Base delay for the hero entrance sequence. Each subsequent element adds 0.2s.

components.name: Button Primary
components.description: Institutional stamp CTA. Brass fill, uppercase, squared. Used in hero and body sections.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background-color: rgba(212, 175, 55, 0.9); color: #1a1a1a; padding: 8px 20px; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; border-radius: 8px; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.5s ease; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background-color: #d4af37; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #a58d4e; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Button Ghost
components.description: Secondary text CTA for video hero contexts. Em-dash prefix, no border, white at 68% opacity.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; border: none; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.68); font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 400; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.12em; cursor: pointer; padding: 0; transition: color 0.4s ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #a58d4e; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Category Label
components.description: The annotation layer. 10px uppercase, tracking 0.28em, muted brass. Identifies subject and location.
components.css: .ds-category-label { display: inline-block; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.625rem; font-weight: 400; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.28em; color: rgba(212, 175, 55, 0.55); }

components.name: Editorial Separator
components.description: 40px × 1px brass line. Appears between category label and headline. The signature micro-element.
components.css: .ds-separator { width: 40px; height: 1px; background-color: rgba(212, 175, 55, 0.3); transform-origin: left; }

components.name: Course Meta Strip
components.description: Inline fact row below CTAs. Pure information, no decoration.
components.css: .ds-meta-strip { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; column-gap: 16px; row-gap: 4px; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 0.05em; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.35); }

components.name: FAQ Accordion Item
components.description: Minimal accordion for FAQ sections. No card wrapper, Ghost Border dividers.
components.html: Sljedeći tečaj se održava 27.–29. 03. 2026. u Zagrebu, Prostor XY.
components.css: .ds-accordion-item { border-bottom: 1px solid #e3e3e3; } .ds-accordion-trigger { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; width: 100%; padding: 16px 0; background: transparent; border: none; cursor: pointer; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 500; color: #1a1a1a; text-align: left; } .ds-accordion-trigger:hover .ds-accordion-icon { opacity: 0.6; } .ds-accordion-trigger:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #a58d4e; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-accordion-icon { flex-shrink: 0; color: #3b3b3b; transition: transform 0.2s ease-out, opacity 0.2s ease-out; } .ds-accordion-content { padding-bottom: 16px; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 400; color: #3b3b3b; line-height: 1.6; }

components.name: Section Title
components.description: Playfair Display headline with optional brass label above. Chapter heading voice.
components.css: .ds-section-title { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; } .ds-section-label { font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.625rem; font-weight: 400; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.28em; color: rgba(165, 141, 78, 0.7); } .ds-section-headline { font-family: 'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.3; color: #1a1a1a; margin: 0; }

narrative.overview:
Supra Studium is not a course platform. It is an institution — and the interface communicates that distinction through what it refuses to do. No urgency mechanics, no persuasion scaffolding, no decorative warmth. The site reads like the opening sequence of a documentary: unhurried, specific, already in motion. The camera (the layout) finds the subject (the content) without commentary.

The palette is a warm archive. Ivory stock, near-black ink, brass used as a letterpress accent and never as a highlight. Typography is editorial: Playfair Display for institutional authority, Inter for clinical precision. White space carries the weight that other sites assign to selling copy.

This system explicitly rejects the aesthetic grammar of online wellness marketing — soft gradients, "journey" language, countdown-to-close CTAs, social-proof tickers — and equally rejects SaaS landing-page construction: hero metrics, benefit card grids, identical icon rows.
keyCharacteristics: Warm neutral base (Archival Ivory) with near-black text — light theme, not stark white
Two brass tones: Clinical Brass for system accents, Brass Bright for hero-context expressions only
Playfair Display for editorial headings; Inter for clinical body and label text
Full-bleed video heroes with cinematic gradient overlays, not glassmorphism panels
Flat elevation by default; depth from tonal section transitions, not shadows
CTAs are institutional stamps: uppercase, tracked, small, squared
Labels: 10px uppercase, tracking 0.28em, muted brass — the annotation layer

rules.name: The One Brass Rule
rules.body: Brass appears on at most 10% of any body-section surface. It marks; it does not fill. When brass occupies more than 10% of a surface, that surface must be the hero video context.

rules.name: The Two-Tone Brass Rule
rules.body: Clinical Brass (#a58d4e) is the system token. Brass Bright (#d4af37) is the hero expression. Never swap them: Brass Bright on a body section reads as shimmer; Clinical Brass in the hero reads as dull.

rules.name: The Mixed-Case Rule
rules.body: Display headlines are mixed case, never all-caps. All-caps at display size reads as campaign; mixed case reads as authored. Labels and CTAs use uppercase, but they are 10–12px — the stamp, not the voice.

rules.name: The Scale Gap Rule
rules.body: Every typographic step maintains at minimum a 1.25 ratio. A flat scale signals a template. The gap between display (32px) and body (14px) is a 2.3 ratio — large enough to read as editorial hierarchy.

rules.name: The Flat-by-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. A shadow that appears without a state change (hover, scroll-trigger, focus) is decoration. Decoration signals insecurity. Remove it.

rules.name: The Tonal Depth Rule
rules.body: Section-to-section contrast replaces elevation. Ivory-to-dark transitions carry more atmosphere than any box-shadow. Use Documentary Dark sections to create depth, not drop shadows on cards.

dos: Do use Playfair Display for any heading that speaks with institutional authority.
Do position hero content in the lower-left, not centered. Asymmetric composition is the documentary convention.
Do write display headlines in mixed case.
Do use uppercase, tracking-0.28em labels at 10px for category annotations.
Do allow white space to carry credibility.
Do write copy in the clinical, observational voice.
Do use the left-heavy cinematic gradient on video heroes.
Do use WCAG 2.1 AA contrast ratios.
Do cite specific anatomy: palpacija, reakcija tkiva, napeta traka, trigger točka, PIR.
Do use tonal section transitions for depth instead of shadows or cards.
donts: Don't use rounded-2xl (32px radius) or larger on CTA buttons.
Don't apply scale(1.05) or any scale transform on CTA hover.
Don't use a uniform bg-black/50 overlay on video backgrounds.
Don't use glassmorphism as a decorative hero content wrapper.
Don't show the price in the CTA button label.
Don't use red urgency badges, countdown timers, or scarcity copy.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text + gradient). The .hero-shimmer and .shimmer-gold CSS classes are deprecated.
Don't build identical card grids with same-size icon + heading + paragraph rows.
Don't use startup SaaS aesthetics: hero metrics, social-proof ticker rails, gradient accent cards.
Don't use wellness marketing language: transformiraj, moć dodira, investiraj u sebe, premium, ekskluzivno, breakthrough.
Don't reference the aesthetic of Udemy, Coursera, or Mindvalley.
Don't use soft pastels, leaf motifs, or coaching energy.
Don't add text-shadow to headings in body sections.
